vars.frame:
600 people are at risk from an outbreak. Which program do you recommend?
A) A program under which exactly 200 of the 600 people will survive and 400 will not.
B) A program with a 1/3 probability that all 600 survive and a 2/3 probability that none survive.

600 people are at risk from an outbreak. Which program do you recommend?
A) A program that saves 200 people for certain.
B) A program with a 1/3 chance of saving all 600 and a 2/3 chance of saving no one.

600 people are at risk from an outbreak. Which program do you recommend?
A) A program under which exactly 400 people will die.
B) A program with a 1/3 probability that nobody dies and a 2/3 probability that all 600 die.

600 people are at risk from an outbreak. Which program do you recommend?
A) A program with a 1/3 probability that all 600 survive and a 2/3 probability that none survive.
B) A program under which exactly 200 of the 600 people will survive and 400 will not.
